name: Robe of Stars
description: This black or dark-blue robe is embroidered with small white or silver stars.

stars.count: Six particularly large stars on upper-front portion

magic_missile.effect: Remove one star and expend it to cast Magic Missile level 5
magic_missile.recharge: Daily at dusk, 1d6 removed stars reappear

astral_travel.effect: Enter Astral Plane with everything you wear and carry
astral_travel.exit: Magic action to return to previous plane
astral_travel.location: Reappear in last space occupied or nearest unoccupied space
